description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a matte black metal barrel and receiver, paired with a dark brown wooden stock and fore-end. The barrel is relatively short, suggesting a tactical or home-defense design, and it is smooth with no visible ribbing or venting. The wooden stock is full-sized, straight, and robust, providing a solid shoulder rest, while the fore-end is ribbed for grip and clearly designed to be pumped. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a single trigger and offering basic protection. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a utilitarian finish and minimal decorative elements, suitable for practical use in urban environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a matte black barrel and receiver, dark brown wooden stock, and ribbed fore-end. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a short barrel and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the black barrel, receiver, and the dark brown wooden stock and fore-end.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the narrow profile of the barrel and stock, with minimal detail visible except the linear alignment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, again showing the full length, with the pump and trigger guard visible.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view revealing the underside of the barrel and stock, with the trigger guard and fore-end grip faintly visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, smooth with no visible ribbing or venting, short length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a simple, unreinforced design
